subject: Milcery — a small round cream-colored Pokemon with pink cream tufts on its head
description: A small, soft, round Pokemon with a cream-white body sits in a pastel outdoor setting. It has tiny dark dot eyes and pink-tinted cream decorations on its head resembling whipped toppings. The background suggests a garden or outdoor floral environment with soft warm pinks and greens. A small wrapped gift or present appears to be visible nearby in the background. The overall tone of the image is gentle, pastel, and sweet.
foreground: small round cream-white Pokemon with pink cream tufts on head
background: soft pastel garden setting, pinks and greens
